item.title: Why Frozen Fruit Tastes Bad and How to Fix It
item.description: Simple tips to improve frozen fruit texture and flavor, with practical storage ideas from That Practical Mom.

media:content.media:title: Why Frozen Fruit Tastes Bad and How to Fix It

item.title: Noticing When You’re Not Fully Present
item.description: A simple reflection on how often we can drift through the day. That Practical Mom shares a relatable reminder to slow down and be more present.

media:content.media:title: Noticing When You’re Not Fully Present
media:content.media:description: A simple reflection on how often we can drift through the day. That Practical Mom shares a relatable reminder to slow down and be more present.

item.title: How Social Media Fuels Comparison
item.description: A simple look at how social media can make everyday comparison feel constant, with a practical reminder to focus on what matters most.

media:content.media:title: How Social Media Fuels Comparison
media:content.media:description: A simple look at how social media can make everyday comparison feel constant, with a practical reminder to focus on what matters most.

item.title: Stretch Chicken for the Week
item.description: A simple, budget-friendly way to make chicken go further all week.
